summary: Iteration 63 - Universal Tab Navigation for Mobile & Desktop tested and bug fixed. Found and fixed bug in GodModePage.js where persona switching passed full object instead of persona.id string, causing sidebar navigation to not update when using God Mode. All role-based navigation now working correctly for Desktop Sidebar and Mobile BottomNav.

sidebar_the_peak_for_comp_surfer_pro.details: Sidebar shows 'The Peak' tab (Crown icon, amber color) for Comp Surfer and Pro roles

sidebar_the_inside_for_grom.details: Sidebar shows 'The Inside' tab (Baby icon, cyan color) for Grom role

sidebar_stoked_for_all_surfers.details: Sidebar shows 'Stoked' tab (Zap icon, yellow color) for all surfer roles (Grom, Surfer, Comp Surfer, Pro)

sidebar_impact_for_all_photographers.details: Sidebar shows 'Impact' tab (Heart icon, pink color) for ALL photographer roles (Hobbyist, Photographer, Approved Pro)

bottomnav_the_peak_for_competitive.details: BottomNav shows 'The Peak' (Crown icon) for Comp Surfer/Pro on mobile

bottomnav_inside_for_grom.details: BottomNav shows 'Inside' (Baby icon) for Grom role on mobile

bottomnav_stoked_for_regular_surfers.details: BottomNav shows 'Stoked' (Zap icon) for regular Surfer role on mobile

bottomnav_impact_for_photographers.details: BottomNav shows 'Impact' (Heart icon) for all photographer roles on mobile

stoked_page_loads.details: /stoked route loads StokedDashboard with XP progress, Sessions Joined, Badges Earned, Event Wins, Sponsor Support, Quick Actions

stoked_dashboard_components.details: Shows: XP level/progress bar, Sessions count, Badges count, Competition wins, Stoke Income, Quick Actions buttons

impact_dashboard_accessible.details: /impact route loads ImpactDashboard for all photographer roles with Credits Given, Groms Supported, Causes Supported stats

the_peak_hub_loads.details: /career/the-peak loads ThePeakHub with Competition Stats (Event Wins, Podiums, Heat Wins, Avg Score), Recent Results, Sponsorship Manager

the_inside_hub_loads.details: /career/the-inside loads TheInsideHub with Road to The Peak progress, Grom Series Results, Stoke Sponsors

safe_area_inset_padding.details: All Career Hub pages have safe-area-inset padding via CSS: paddingBottom: calc(env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0px) + 80px)

god_mode_persona_switching.details: Fixed bug in GodModePage.js - was passing full persona object instead of persona.id string, causing getEffectiveRole() to return object instead of string, breaking role comparisons in Sidebar/BottomNav

bug_fixed.issue: handleSelectPersona was passing full persona object to setPersona() but Sidebar.js and BottomNav.js expected string role ID
bug_fixed.fix: Changed setPersona(persona) to setPersona(persona.id) and updated isActive comparison from activePersona?.id === persona.id to activePersona === persona.id

critical_code_review_comments: Role-based navigation properly implemented in Sidebar.js and BottomNav.js using getEffectiveRole() from PersonaContext
PersonaContext.getEffectiveRole() returns activePersona string when in God Mode, otherwise returns user's actual role
All 4 photographer roles (Grom Parent, Hobbyist, Photographer, Approved Pro) correctly show Impact tab
All 4 surfer roles (Grom, Surfer, Comp Surfer, Pro) correctly show Stoked tab
Competitive surfers (Comp Surfer, Pro) show The Peak hub, Grom shows The Inside hub
Safe-area-inset CSS properly applied for iPhone notch/home indicator on all hub pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role-based navigation working correctly. Bug in GodModePage.js was fixed where persona.id must be passed (string) not full object. All Career Hub pages at /stoked, /impact, /career/the-peak, /career/the-inside loading correctly with proper components.

21_comp_surfer_fixed.png - Sidebar with The Peak + Stoked for Comp Surfer
22-26 - Mobile BottomNav tests for different roles
